div1.entryFree:
Imagined, adj. 1) pertaining to the imagination (cf. imaginary): bring them with i. speed unto the tranect, Merch. III, 4, 52 (with the speed of imagination). thus with i. wing our swift scene flies, H5 III Chor. H5 III Chor.
2) pertaining to thought, having its seat in the soul: let rich music's tongue unfold the i. happiness that both receive in either, Rom. II, 6, 28.
